title: Building our Potential: Ireland's Offshore Wind Skills and Talent Needs
author: GreenTech Skillnet
summary: Comprehensive analysis of the workforce requirements to meet Ireland's offshore wind targets. Identifies critical skills gaps, training needs, and recommendations for education providers and policy makers.

title: Offshore Wind Skills Action Plan 2024
author: Department of Further and Higher Education, Research, Innovation and Science
summary: Government action plan outlining strategic priorities and actions to develop the skilled workforce needed for Ireland's offshore wind sector.

title: Irish Offshore Wind Workforce Demand Forecast 2025–2035
author: Wind Energy Ireland
summary: Projections of workforce demand across all offshore wind roles over the next decade, broken down by project phase and skill category.

title: Global Wind Organisation Training Standards: A Guide for Ireland
author: Skillnet Offshore Wind Academy
summary: Overview of GWO training standards relevant to the Irish offshore wind market, including where to access accredited training and how standards map to career requirements.

title: Career Transitions into Offshore Wind: Irish Case Studies
author: Skillnet Offshore Wind Academy
summary: Real stories of Irish workers who have successfully transitioned from adjacent industries (oil & gas, marine, construction, electrical) into offshore wind careers.
